subject: Urgent: Verify your account now
body: Dear customer, your account will be suspended today unless you verify your password immediately. Click the secure form and confirm your login details to avoid permanent closure.

subject: Invoice attached for review
body: Hello team, please review the attached invoice for March services and let me know if any line item looks incorrect.

subject: Congratulations! You won a gift card
body: You have been selected as the lucky winner of a $500 gift card. Claim your prize now by entering your banking details and password.

subject: Meeting moved to 3 PM
body: The client asked to move today's meeting to 3 PM. Please join the same calendar link.

subject: Password reset request
body: We detected unusual activity. Reset your password right now or your mailbox access will be disabled in 30 minutes.

subject: Project update and notes
body: I pushed the latest dashboard fixes. Please review the comments before tomorrow's demo.

subject: Tax refund pending
body: Your tax refund is pending. Submit your social security number and bank login to receive the amount without delay.

subject: Your order has shipped
body: Good news, your package has shipped and should arrive by Friday. Tracking details are included in the receipt.

subject: Account suspended notice
body: Your Apple ID has been locked for suspicious billing activity. Confirm your credentials immediately to reactivate the account.

subject: Lunch tomorrow?
body: Are you free for lunch tomorrow near the campus cafe? I can be there around 1 PM.

subject: Final warning about mailbox quota
body: Your mailbox exceeded the storage limit. Update your credentials to keep receiving email and prevent account suspension.

subject: Weekly sprint summary
body: Here is the sprint summary with completed tickets, blockers, and the plan for next week.

subject: Security alert: unusual sign in
body: We blocked a suspicious sign in attempt. Confirm your account PIN and password immediately to secure your profile.

subject: Flight itinerary confirmation
body: Your booking is confirmed. Please find the itinerary, baggage allowance, and check-in details below.

subject: Direct deposit issue
body: Your salary transfer failed. Verify your employee portal password and bank details today to avoid payroll delay.

subject: Workshop registration confirmed
body: Thank you for registering for the data science workshop. Check-in begins at 9 AM in Hall B.

subject: Winner notification
body: This is your final notice. You won the international lottery. Send your date of birth and account credentials to release your funds.

subject: Family photos
body: I uploaded the family photos from the weekend trip. Let me know which ones you want printed.

subject: Action required: secure your wallet
body: Your wallet access will be restricted. Verify recovery phrase and account password within one hour.

subject: Research paper feedback
body: I reviewed your draft and added comments on the methodology section. The literature review is improving.

subject: Document shared with you
body: A document has been shared with you. Open it from Drive when you have time to review the outline.

subject: Confirm payment now
body: Your subscription payment failed. Confirm card information and login credentials now to prevent service interruption.

subject: New company policy
body: Please read the updated remote work policy and acknowledge it by Friday through the HR portal.

subject: Urgent legal complaint
body: A complaint has been filed against you. Download the attached form and submit your personal credentials to avoid arrest.

subject: Code review notes
body: Thanks for the cleanup in the parser module. I left a few notes about naming and test coverage.

subject: Mailbox password expiration
body: Your password expires today. Keep your mailbox active by confirming your current credentials and backup email.

subject: Conference tickets
body: Your conference tickets are attached. Doors open at 8:30 AM and breakfast will be served.

subject: Bank statement available
body: Your monthly bank statement is now available in the secure online portal. No action is needed unless you notice something unusual.

subject: Immediate action needed
body: We noticed a problem processing your order. Login and confirm your shipping address, password, and payment details immediately.

subject: Class cancelled
body: Today's 2 PM class is cancelled due to a faculty meeting. Slides will be uploaded this evening.

subject: Re: internship shortlist
body: Thanks for your application. We would like to schedule an introductory call next week.

subject: Security update required
body: Your profile will be disabled unless you complete identity confirmation and submit your login password now.

subject: Travel reimbursement form
body: Please fill out the reimbursement form for your client travel and attach the hotel invoice.

subject: Unusual billing attempt
body: We detected unusual billing behavior. Verify your card PIN, CVV, and account login to stop fraudulent charges.

subject: Birthday dinner plans
body: We're planning dinner for Saturday night at 7 PM. Let me know if that time works for you.

subject: Mandatory VPN revalidation
body: Remote access has been suspended. Revalidate your VPN account by entering your username and password at the secure portal.

subject: Newsletter March edition
body: Welcome to the March edition of our newsletter with community highlights, release notes, and upcoming events.
